name: npc-portrait-assets
title: NPC形象素材
creator: lijin
notes: 2026-04-23 runtime-check checkpoint. Chose Approach A and fixed the canonical runtime asset path at frontend/app/assets/npc-style-cast/portraits/. Landed 12 tavern-themed portraits covering merchant/guardian/healer/scholar/wanderer/spirit, added portraitCatalog.ts for archetype matching + deterministic variant selection, and rewired TavernNpcStage so owner-authored images still win (sprites.neutral > avatar > image_url > project fallback portrait) without cropping tavern-npc-style-cast.png anymore. Follow-up check finished the asset-size review: runtime portrait copies were downscaled from 1254x1254 to optimized 256x256 PNGs, reducing the 12-file total from about 28.33 MB to about 1.49 MB without changing filenames or fallback behavior. docs/IMAGE_ASSETS_SPEC.md and frontend/app/assets/npc-style-cast/README.md were synced to the final canonical contract (12 portraits under frontend/app/assets/npc-style-cast/portraits/; tavern-themed interior portrait prompt, not transparent placeholders). Phase-4 runtime smoke check then launched the local app at http://127.0.0.1:8950/ via `py -3 -m fablemap_api api --frontend-root frontend/build/client --no-open`, verified `/api/meta`, `/`, and `/api/taverns` with direct local requests, and confirmed default public-welfare tavern characters still have no owner-authored art so the portrait fallback path remains exercised. Fresh validation for this checkpoint: npm --prefix .\frontend run typecheck, npm --prefix .\frontend run build, plus direct local HTTP smoke checks. Frontend script tests were still not rerun because the task did not change service/rule scripts. Resume from phase 4 with browser visual QA before final closeout. 2026-04-24 user requested commit/push with the current optimized portrait checkpoint.
